This site uses cookies and related technologies to enhance user experience, analyze performance and traffic on our website, and to enable our service providers to provide you with targeted communications. For details on how we use cookies and the personal information we collect, review our Privacy Policy.

Community

  • Areas we serve
  • Pacific Power Foundation
  • Community engagement
  • Economic development
  • Blue Sky community projects
  • Webinars & events
  • Recreation

Economic development

If you're looking to move or expand your company — whether it's to be near materials you need for manufacturing, or closer to end users of your product — we can help. We have spent the past century building relationships throughout the West.

Below are some of the services we offer along with some of our customer successes. To learn more, please contact our economic development team:

  • Oregon
  • Washington
  • California

Partner with us to meet your goals

Business retention and expansion

  • Support communities' efforts to strengthen existing businesses.
  • Provide assistance with business retention and expansion committee formation, project development, implementation and analysis.
  • Establish business assistance teams.

Business development resources

  • Provide information useful to guide infrastructure investments, target industries for specific sites and help communities prioritize site development activities.
  • Prepare billing estimates for your new or expanding business.
  • Other business resources:
    • Energy efficiency resources
    • Energy Trust of Oregon
    • Electric vehicles and charging resources
    • Keeping prices low
    • Supplier diversity

Community consulting

  • Work with community leaders and organizations to build economic vitality.
  • Facilitate strategic planning and goal setting for communities.
  • Consult on infrastructure improvements, land use and growth management.
  • Assist with target industries selection.

Large-scale electric service requests

Review the process for large-scale electric service requests (>20 megawatts of new or existing load growth). 

Service area

We deliver safe, reliable power to communities across three states.


See enlarged map »

Blue Mountain Station

As a community partner, Pacific Power played a key role in the development of the Port of Columbia's Blue Mountain Station 28-acre "eco-friendly food park" in Dayton, Washington.

Learn more

City of Albany

The city of Albany, Oregon, worked with Pacific Power and Energy Trust of Oregon to replace nearly 3,000 lights throughout the city with energy-efficient LEDs. 

Read more

Bringing electric mobility to communities

Through programs ranging from school transportation to agricultural equipment, we’re helping communities expand clean mobility alternatives.

Watch video

Local roots

In Bend, Oregon, new partnerships show how business and the community grow stronger together.

Watch video
